member.name: T:Notification.Core.AbsolutePositionData
member.summary: Represents absolute position data for placing a notification at specific screen coordinates relative to a corner.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.AbsolutePositionData.X
member.summary: Gets or sets the horizontal offset in pixels from the base corner.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.AbsolutePositionData.Y
member.summary: Gets or sets the vertical offset in pixels from the base corner.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.AbsolutePositionData.BaseCorner
member.summary: Gets or sets the screen corner used as the origin for positioning.

member.name: T:Notification.Core.NotificationColor
member.summary: Represents a platform-independent RGBA color for notification styling.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationColor.R
member.summary: Gets the red component of the color (0–255).

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationColor.G
member.summary: Gets the green component of the color (0–255).

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationColor.B
member.summary: Gets the blue component of the color (0–255).

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationColor.A
member.summary: Gets the alpha (opacity) component of the color (0–255).

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationColor.#ctor(System.Byte,System.Byte,System.Byte,System.Byte)
member.summary: Initializes a new with the specified RGBA components.
member.param: The alpha component (0–255). Defaults to 255 (fully opaque).

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationColor.FromRgb(System.Byte,System.Byte,System.Byte)
member.summary: Creates a fully opaque color from the specified RGB components.
member.returns: A new with alpha set to 255.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationColor.FromArgb(System.Byte,System.Byte,System.Byte,System.Byte)
member.summary: Creates a color from the specified ARGB components.
member.returns: A new instance.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationColor.FromHex(System.String)
member.summary: Parses a hexadecimal color string in #RRGGBB or #AARRGGBB format.
member.param: The hex color string, with or without a leading '#'.
member.returns: A new parsed from the hex string.
member.exception: Thrown when is null or whitespace.
Thrown when the hex string is not in a valid format.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationColor.ToHex
member.summary: Converts this color to its #AARRGGBB hexadecimal string representation.
member.returns: A hex string in the format #AARRGGBB.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationColor.op_Implicit(System.String)~Notification.Core.NotificationColor
member.summary: Implicitly converts a hex color string to a .
member.param: The hex color string to convert.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationColor.White
member.summary: Represents the color white (255, 255, 255).

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationColor.WhiteSmoke
member.summary: Represents the color white smoke (245, 245, 245).

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationColor.LimeGreen
member.summary: Represents the color lime green (50, 205, 50).

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationColor.Orange
member.summary: Represents the color orange (255, 165, 0).

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationColor.OrangeRed
member.summary: Represents the color orange red (255, 69, 0).

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationColor.CornflowerBlue
member.summary: Represents the color cornflower blue (100, 149, 237).

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationColor.DarkGray
member.summary: Represents the color dark gray (68, 68, 68).

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationColor.Green
member.summary: Represents the color green (1, 211, 40).

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationColor.op_Equality(Notification.Core.NotificationColor,Notification.Core.NotificationColor)
member.summary: Determines whether two instances are equal.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationColor.op_Inequality(Notification.Core.NotificationColor,Notification.Core.NotificationColor)
member.summary: Determines whether two instances are not equal.

member.name: T:Notification.Core.NotificationImageData
member.summary: Represents image data and layout settings for a notification image.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationImageData.RawData
member.summary: Gets or sets the raw image bytes. Used when the image is provided as in-memory data.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationImageData.Uri
member.summary: Gets or sets the URI of the image resource. Used when the image is loaded from a file or URL.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationImageData.Position
member.summary: Gets or sets the position of the image within the notification layout.

member.name: T:Notification.Core.NotificationTextSettings
member.summary: Represents text rendering settings for notification content, including font, alignment, and opacity.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationTextSettings.FontFamily
member.summary: Gets or sets the font family name. Defaults to "Segoe UI".

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationTextSettings.FontSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the font size in device-independent pixels. Defaults to 14.0.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationTextSettings.FontStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets the font style (e.g., Normal, Italic). Defaults to .

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationTextSettings.FontWeight
member.summary: Gets or sets the font weight (e.g., Normal, Bold). Defaults to .

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationTextSettings.TextAlignment
member.summary: Gets or sets the text alignment within the text block. Defaults to .

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationTextSettings.HorizontalAlignment
member.summary: Gets or sets the horizontal alignment of the text element. Defaults to .

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationTextSettings.VerticalAlignment
member.summary: Gets or sets the vertical alignment of the text element. Defaults to .

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationTextSettings.Opacity
member.summary: Gets or sets the text opacity, where 0.0 is fully transparent and 1.0 is fully opaque. Defaults to 1.0.

member.name: T:Notification.Core.NotificationThickness
member.summary: Represents a platform-independent thickness (margin or padding) with values for each side.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationThickness.Left
member.summary: Gets the left side thickness in device-independent pixels.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationThickness.Top
member.summary: Gets the top side thickness in device-independent pixels.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationThickness.Right
member.summary: Gets the right side thickness in device-independent pixels.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationThickness.Bottom
member.summary: Gets the bottom side thickness in device-independent pixels.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationThickness.#ctor(System.Double)
member.summary: Initializes a new with the same value applied to all four sides.
member.param: The uniform thickness value for all sides.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationThickness.#ctor(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Initializes a new with individual values for each side.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationThickness.op_Equality(Notification.Core.NotificationThickness,Notification.Core.NotificationThickness)
member.summary: Determines whether two instances are equal.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationThickness.op_Inequality(Notification.Core.NotificationThickness,Notification.Core.NotificationThickness)
member.summary: Determines whether two instances are not equal.

member.name: T:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder
member.summary: Provides a fluent API for constructing instances.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder._title
member.summary: The notification title.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder._message
member.summary: The notification message body.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder._type
member.summary: The notification type.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder._areaName
member.summary: The name of the target notification area.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder._expirationTime
member.summary: The time after which the notification expires; null means never.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder._closeOnClick
member.summary: Indicates whether the notification closes when clicked.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder._showCloseButton
member.summary: Indicates whether the close button is shown.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder._priority
member.summary: The notification priority.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder._groupKey
member.summary: The grouping key used to coalesce related notifications.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder._backgroundColor
member.summary: The background color override.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder._foregroundColor
member.summary: The foreground color override.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder._titleSettings
member.summary: The text settings applied to the title.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder._messageSettings
member.summary: The text settings applied to the message.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder._trimType
member.summary: The text trimming mode.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder._rowsCount
member.summary: The maximum number of message rows before trimming applies.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder._leftButtonAction
member.summary: The action invoked when the left button is clicked.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder._leftButtonContent
member.summary: The content (text) of the left button.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder._rightButtonAction
member.summary: The action invoked when the right button is clicked.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder._rightButtonContent
member.summary: The content (text) of the right button.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder._onClick
member.summary: The action invoked when the notification is clicked.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder._onClose
member.summary: The action invoked when the notification is closed.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder._onRightClick
member.summary: The action invoked when the notification is right-clicked.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder._icon
member.summary: The notification icon.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder._platformImage
member.summary: The platform-specific image object.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder._content
member.summary: The arbitrary platform-specific content object.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder._extensions
member.summary: The collection of platform-specific extension values.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder.Create
member.summary: Creates a new empty instance.
member.returns: A new builder instance.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder.Create(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new instance with the specified title and message.
member.returns: A new builder instance with title and message set.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder.WithTitle(System.String)
member.summary: Sets the notification title.
member.returns: The current builder instance for chaining.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder.WithMessage(System.String)
member.summary: Sets the notification message.
member.returns: The current builder instance for chaining.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder.OfType(Notification.Core.NotificationType)
member.summary: Sets the notification type.
member.returns: The current builder instance for chaining.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder.AsInformation
member.summary: Sets the notification type to .
member.returns: The current builder instance for chaining.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder.AsSuccess
member.summary: Sets the notification type to .
member.returns: The current builder instance for chaining.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder.AsWarning
member.summary: Sets the notification type to .
member.returns: The current builder instance for chaining.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder.AsError
member.summary: Sets the notification type to .
member.returns: The current builder instance for chaining.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder.InArea(System.String)
member.summary: Sets the notification area name where the notification will be displayed.
member.returns: The current builder instance for chaining.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder.ExpiresIn(System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Sets the notification expiration time.
member.param: The duration after which the notification automatically closes.
member.returns: The current builder instance for chaining.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder.ExpiresInSeconds(System.Double)
member.summary: Sets the notification expiration time in seconds.
member.param: The number of seconds before the notification closes.
member.returns: The current builder instance for chaining.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder.NeverExpires
member.summary: Configures the notification to never expire automatically.
member.returns: The current builder instance for chaining.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder.CloseOnClick(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Sets whether the notification closes when clicked.
member.param: True to close on click; false to keep open.
member.returns: The current builder instance for chaining.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder.HideCloseButton
member.summary: Hides the close button on the notification.
member.returns: The current builder instance for chaining.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder.WithPriority(Notification.Core.NotificationPriority)
member.summary: Sets the notification display priority.
member.returns: The current builder instance for chaining.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder.GroupAs(System.String)
member.summary: Sets the group key for notification deduplication.
member.param: The group key. Notifications with the same key replace each other.
member.returns: The current builder instance for chaining.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder.WithBackground(Notification.Core.NotificationColor)
member.summary: Sets the notification background color.
member.returns: The current builder instance for chaining.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder.WithBackground(System.String)
member.summary: Sets the notification background color from a hex string.
member.returns: The current builder instance for chaining.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder.WithForeground(Notification.Core.NotificationColor)
member.summary: Sets the notification foreground (text) color.
member.returns: The current builder instance for chaining.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder.WithForeground(System.String)
member.summary: Sets the notification foreground (text) color from a hex string.
member.returns: The current builder instance for chaining.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder.WithTitleSettings(System.Action{Notification.Core.NotificationTextSettings})
member.summary: Configures the title text rendering settings.
member.param: An action to configure the title text settings.
member.returns: The current builder instance for chaining.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder.WithMessageSettings(System.Action{Notification.Core.NotificationTextSettings})
member.summary: Configures the message text rendering settings.
member.param: An action to configure the message text settings.
member.returns: The current builder instance for chaining.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder.WithTrimming(Notification.Core.NotificationTextTrimType,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Configures text trimming behavior for the notification message.
member.param: The maximum number of visible rows before trimming.
member.returns: The current builder instance for chaining.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder.WithLeftButton(System.String,System.Action)
member.summary: Configures the left button with text and a click action.
member.param: The action invoked when the button is clicked.
member.returns: The current builder instance for chaining.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder.WithRightButton(System.String,System.Action)
member.summary: Configures the right button with text and a click action.
member.param: The action invoked when the button is clicked.
member.returns: The current builder instance for chaining.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder.WithOkCancel(System.Action,System.Action)
member.summary: Configures Ok and Cancel buttons with the specified actions.
member.param: The action invoked when Ok is clicked.
The action invoked when Cancel is clicked. If null, a no-op action is used.
member.returns: The current builder instance for chaining.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder.OnClick(System.Action)
member.summary: Sets the action invoked when the notification body is clicked.
member.returns: The current builder instance for chaining.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder.OnClose(System.Action)
member.summary: Sets the action invoked when the notification is closed.
member.returns: The current builder instance for chaining.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder.OnRightClick(System.Action)
member.summary: Sets the action invoked when the notification body is right-clicked.
member.returns: The current builder instance for chaining.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder.WithIcon(System.Object)
member.summary: Sets the notification icon. The type is platform-dependent.
member.returns: The current builder instance for chaining.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder.WithImage(Notification.Core.NotificationImageData)
member.summary: Sets the notification image.
member.param: The image data to display in the notification.
member.returns: The current builder instance for chaining.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder.WithContent(System.Object)
member.summary: Sets an arbitrary platform-specific content object to display instead of the standard title/message layout. The type is platform-dependent (for example, a WPF control).
member.returns: The current builder instance for chaining.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder.WithExtension(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Adds a custom extension key-value pair to the notification.
member.returns: The current builder instance for chaining.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder.Build
member.summary: Builds and returns the configured instance.
member.returns: A new populated with the builder's settings.

member.name: T:Notification.Core.NotificationServiceExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for to simplify notification creation.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationServiceExtensions.Show(Notification.Core.INotificationService,System.Action{Notification.Core.NotificationBuilder})
member.summary: Shows a notification configured via a fluent builder action.
member.param: An action that configures the notification using a .
member.returns: The unique identifier of the displayed notification.

member.name: T:Notification.Core.NotificationConfiguration
member.summary: Provides default configuration settings for the notification system, including positioning, sizing, colors, and text formatting.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationConfiguration.MessagePosition
member.summary: Gets or sets the screen position where notifications are displayed.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationConfiguration.IsReversedPanel
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the notification panel order is reversed. When null, the default behavior is used.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationConfiguration.MinWidth
member.summary: Gets or sets the minimum width of a notification in pixels.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationConfiguration.MaxWidth
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum width of a notification in pixels.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationConfiguration.MaxOverlayWindowCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of notification overlay windows that can be displayed simultaneously.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationConfiguration.CollapseProgressIfMoreRows
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether progress bars are automatically collapsed when there are more rows than the limit.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationConfiguration.DefaultExpirationTime
member.summary: Gets or sets the default expiration time for notifications that do not specify one explicitly.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationConfiguration.DefaultBackgroundColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the default background color for notifications without a specific type.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationConfiguration.DefaultForegroundColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the default foreground (text) color for notifications.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationConfiguration.SuccessBackgroundColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the background color for success notifications.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationConfiguration.WarningBackgroundColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the background color for warning notifications.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationConfiguration.ErrorBackgroundColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the background color for error notifications.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationConfiguration.InformationBackgroundColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the background color for information notifications.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationConfiguration.DefaultProgressColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the default color for progress bar indicators.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationConfiguration.BaseTextSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the base text size in pixels.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationConfiguration.TitleSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the title text size in pixels.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationConfiguration.MessageSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the message text size in pixels.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationConfiguration.FontName
member.summary: Gets or sets the font family name used for notification text.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationConfiguration.TitleTextAlignment
member.summary: Gets or sets the text alignment for notification titles.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationConfiguration.MessageTextAlignment
member.summary: Gets or sets the text alignment for notification messages.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationConfiguration.DefaultRowCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the default number of visible text rows before trimming.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationConfiguration.DefaultTrimType
member.summary: Gets or sets the default text trimming type applied to notification text.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationConfiguration.CancellationMessage
member.summary: Gets or sets the message displayed when an operation is cancelled.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationConfiguration.OpenFileMessage
member.summary: Gets or sets the label text for the "Open File" action.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationConfiguration.OpenFolderMessage
member.summary: Gets or sets the label text for the "Open Folder" action.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationConfiguration.DefaultLeftButtonContent
member.summary: Gets or sets the default content for the left button.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationConfiguration.DefaultRightButtonContent
member.summary: Gets or sets the default content for the right button.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationConfiguration.DefaultProgressButtonContent
member.summary: Gets or sets the default content for the progress bar cancel button.

member.name: T:Notification.Core.NotificationCoreServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for registering core notification services in an .

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationCoreServiceCollectionExtensions.AddNotifications(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{Notification.Core.INotificationConfiguration})
member.summary: Registers the core notification services including configuration, event service, and notification queue.
member.param: The service collection to add the services to.
An optional action to customize the notification configuration.
member.returns: The service collection for chaining.

member.name: T:Notification.Core.Corner
member.summary: Specifies a corner of a rectangular area.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.Corner.TopLeft
member.summary: The top-left corner.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.Corner.TopRight
member.summary: The top-right corner.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.Corner.BottomLeft
member.summary: The bottom-left corner.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.Corner.BottomRight
member.summary: The bottom-right corner.

member.name: T:Notification.Core.ImagePosition
member.summary: Specifies the position of an image within a notification.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.ImagePosition.None
member.summary: No image is displayed.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.ImagePosition.Top
member.summary: The image is placed at the top of the notification.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.ImagePosition.Bottom
member.summary: The image is placed at the bottom of the notification.

member.name: T:Notification.Core.NotificationFontStyle
member.summary: Specifies the font style for notification text.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationFontStyle.Normal
member.summary: Normal upright font style.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationFontStyle.Italic
member.summary: Italic font style with characters designed to slant to the right.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationFontStyle.Oblique
member.summary: Oblique font style with artificially slanted characters.

member.name: T:Notification.Core.NotificationFontWeight
member.summary: Specifies the weight (thickness) of the font used in notification text.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationFontWeight.Thin
member.summary: Thin font weight (100).

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationFontWeight.ExtraLight
member.summary: Extra-light font weight (200).

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationFontWeight.Light
member.summary: Light font weight (300).

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationFontWeight.Normal
member.summary: Normal (regular) font weight (400).

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationFontWeight.Medium
member.summary: Medium font weight (500).

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationFontWeight.SemiBold
member.summary: Semi-bold font weight (600).

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationFontWeight.Bold
member.summary: Bold font weight (700).

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationFontWeight.ExtraBold
member.summary: Extra-bold font weight (800).

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationFontWeight.Black
member.summary: Black (heavy) font weight (900).

member.name: T:Notification.Core.NotificationHorizontalAlignment
member.summary: Specifies the horizontal alignment of content within a notification.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationHorizontalAlignment.Left
member.summary: Content is aligned to the left.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationHorizontalAlignment.Center
member.summary: Content is centered horizontally.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationHorizontalAlignment.Right
member.summary: Content is aligned to the right.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationHorizontalAlignment.Stretch
member.summary: Content is stretched to fill the available horizontal space.

member.name: T:Notification.Core.NotificationLifecycleStage
member.summary: Represents the lifecycle stage of a notification.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationLifecycleStage.Shown
member.summary: The notification has been displayed to the user.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationLifecycleStage.Clicked
member.summary: The notification was clicked by the user.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationLifecycleStage.Closed
member.summary: The notification was explicitly closed.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationLifecycleStage.TimedOut
member.summary: The notification expired after its display duration elapsed.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationLifecycleStage.Dismissed
member.summary: The notification was dismissed by the user.

member.name: T:Notification.Core.NotificationPosition
member.summary: Specifies the screen position where notifications are displayed.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationPosition.TopLeft
member.summary: Top-left corner of the screen.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationPosition.TopRight
member.summary: Top-right corner of the screen.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationPosition.TopCenter
member.summary: Top-center of the screen.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationPosition.BottomLeft
member.summary: Bottom-left corner of the screen.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationPosition.BottomRight
member.summary: Bottom-right corner of the screen.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationPosition.BottomCenter
member.summary: Bottom-center of the screen.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationPosition.CenterLeft
member.summary: Center-left edge of the screen.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationPosition.CenterRight
member.summary: Center-right edge of the screen.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationPosition.Center
member.summary: Center of the screen.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationPosition.Absolute
member.summary: An absolute position specified by explicit coordinates.

member.name: T:Notification.Core.NotificationPriority
member.summary: Specifies the priority level of a notification, affecting its display order.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationPriority.Low
member.summary: Low priority; displayed after higher-priority notifications.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationPriority.Normal
member.summary: Normal (default) priority.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationPriority.High
member.summary: High priority; displayed before normal and low-priority notifications.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationPriority.Critical
member.summary: Critical priority; displayed immediately above all other notifications.

member.name: T:Notification.Core.NotificationTextAlignment
member.summary: Specifies the horizontal text alignment within a notification.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationTextAlignment.Left
member.summary: Text is aligned to the left edge.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationTextAlignment.Center
member.summary: Text is centered horizontally.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationTextAlignment.Right
member.summary: Text is aligned to the right edge.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationTextAlignment.Justify
member.summary: Text is justified, stretching to fill the available width.

member.name: T:Notification.Core.NotificationTextTrimType
member.summary: Specifies how notification text is trimmed when it exceeds the available space.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationTextTrimType.NoTrim
member.summary: No trimming is applied; text is displayed in full.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationTextTrimType.Trim
member.summary: Text is trimmed with an ellipsis when it exceeds the available space.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationTextTrimType.Attach
member.summary: A "more" link or indicator is attached to the trimmed text.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationTextTrimType.AttachIfMoreRows
member.summary: A "more" link or indicator is attached only when the text exceeds the maximum number of rows.

member.name: T:Notification.Core.NotificationType
member.summary: Specifies the type of a notification, which determines its visual appearance and semantics.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationType.None
member.summary: No specific type; uses default styling.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationType.Information
member.summary: An informational notification.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationType.Success
member.summary: A success notification indicating a completed operation.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationType.Warning
member.summary: A warning notification indicating a potential issue.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationType.Error
member.summary: An error notification indicating a failure or critical issue.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationType.Notification
member.summary: A general-purpose notification.

member.name: T:Notification.Core.NotificationVerticalAlignment
member.summary: Specifies the vertical alignment of content within a notification.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationVerticalAlignment.Top
member.summary: Content is aligned to the top.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationVerticalAlignment.Center
member.summary: Content is centered vertically.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationVerticalAlignment.Bottom
member.summary: Content is aligned to the bottom.

member.name: F:Notification.Core.NotificationVerticalAlignment.Stretch
member.summary: Content is stretched to fill the available vertical space.

member.name: T:Notification.Core.INotificationEventService
member.summary: Provides events for tracking notification lifecycle changes.

member.name: E:Notification.Core.INotificationEventService.NotificationLifecycleChanged
member.summary: Occurs when any notification lifecycle stage changes.

member.name: E:Notification.Core.INotificationEventService.NotificationShown
member.summary: Occurs when a notification is displayed to the user.

member.name: E:Notification.Core.INotificationEventService.NotificationClosed
member.summary: Occurs when a notification is closed or dismissed.

member.name: E:Notification.Core.INotificationEventService.NotificationClicked
member.summary: Occurs when a notification is clicked by the user.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.INotificationEventService.Raise(Notification.Core.NotificationLifecycleEventArgs)
member.summary: Raises a notification lifecycle event.
member.param: The event arguments containing the notification identifier and lifecycle stage.

member.name: T:Notification.Core.NotificationEventService
member.summary: Provides a centralized service for raising and subscribing to notification lifecycle events.

member.name: E:Notification.Core.NotificationEventService.NotificationLifecycleChanged
member.summary: Occurs when any notification lifecycle stage changes.

member.name: E:Notification.Core.NotificationEventService.NotificationShown
member.summary: Occurs when a notification is displayed to the user.

member.name: E:Notification.Core.NotificationEventService.NotificationClosed
member.summary: Occurs when a notification is closed for any reason (explicit close, timeout, or dismissal).

member.name: E:Notification.Core.NotificationEventService.NotificationClicked
member.summary: Occurs when a notification is clicked by the user.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationEventService.Raise(Notification.Core.NotificationLifecycleEventArgs)
member.summary: Raises the appropriate lifecycle events based on the notification stage.
member.param: The event arguments containing notification details and the lifecycle stage.

member.name: T:Notification.Core.NotificationLifecycleEventArgs
member.summary: Provides event data for notification lifecycle events such as shown, clicked, closed, and dismissed.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationLifecycleEventArgs.NotificationId
member.summary: Gets the unique identifier of the notification that triggered this event.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationLifecycleEventArgs.Stage
member.summary: Gets the lifecycle stage that the notification has entered.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationLifecycleEventArgs.Timestamp
member.summary: Gets the UTC timestamp when this lifecycle event occurred.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationLifecycleEventArgs.Title
member.summary: Gets the title of the notification at the time of the event.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationLifecycleEventArgs.Message
member.summary: Gets the message of the notification at the time of the event.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationLifecycleEventArgs.#ctor(System.Guid,Notification.Core.NotificationLifecycleStage,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The unique identifier of the notification.
The lifecycle stage that the notification has entered.

member.name: T:Notification.Core.INotificationConfiguration
member.summary: Provides configuration options for the notification system appearance and behavior.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.INotificationConfiguration.MessagePosition
member.summary: Gets or sets the position on screen where notifications are displayed.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.INotificationConfiguration.IsReversedPanel
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the notification panel stacking order is reversed.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.INotificationConfiguration.MinWidth
member.summary: Gets or sets the minimum width of the notification window in pixels.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.INotificationConfiguration.MaxWidth
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum width of the notification window in pixels.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.INotificationConfiguration.MaxOverlayWindowCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of overlay notification windows displayed simultaneously.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.INotificationConfiguration.CollapseProgressIfMoreRows
member.summary: Gets or sets whether to collapse progress notifications when more rows are displayed than allowed.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.INotificationConfiguration.DefaultExpirationTime
member.summary: Gets or sets the default time after which a notification automatically expires.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.INotificationConfiguration.DefaultBackgroundColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the default background color for notifications.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.INotificationConfiguration.DefaultForegroundColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the default foreground (text) color for notifications.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.INotificationConfiguration.SuccessBackgroundColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the background color for success notifications.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.INotificationConfiguration.WarningBackgroundColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the background color for warning notifications.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.INotificationConfiguration.ErrorBackgroundColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the background color for error notifications.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.INotificationConfiguration.InformationBackgroundColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the background color for informational notifications.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.INotificationConfiguration.DefaultProgressColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the default color for progress indicators.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.INotificationConfiguration.BaseTextSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the base text size in pixels used as a reference for scaling.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.INotificationConfiguration.TitleSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the font size for notification titles in pixels.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.INotificationConfiguration.MessageSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the font size for notification messages in pixels.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.INotificationConfiguration.FontName
member.summary: Gets or sets the font family name used for notification text.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.INotificationConfiguration.TitleTextAlignment
member.summary: Gets or sets the text alignment for notification titles.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.INotificationConfiguration.MessageTextAlignment
member.summary: Gets or sets the text alignment for notification messages.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.INotificationConfiguration.DefaultRowCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the default number of visible text rows in a notification.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.INotificationConfiguration.DefaultTrimType
member.summary: Gets or sets the default text trimming type when content exceeds available space.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.INotificationConfiguration.CancellationMessage
member.summary: Gets or sets the display text for the cancellation action.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.INotificationConfiguration.OpenFileMessage
member.summary: Gets or sets the display text for the open file action.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.INotificationConfiguration.OpenFolderMessage
member.summary: Gets or sets the display text for the open folder action.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.INotificationConfiguration.DefaultLeftButtonContent
member.summary: Gets or sets the default content displayed on the left button.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.INotificationConfiguration.DefaultRightButtonContent
member.summary: Gets or sets the default content displayed on the right button.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.INotificationConfiguration.DefaultProgressButtonContent
member.summary: Gets or sets the default content displayed on the progress action button.

member.name: T:Notification.Core.INotificationContent
member.summary: Represents the content and visual configuration of a notification.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.INotificationContent.Title
member.summary: Gets the title text displayed at the top of the notification.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.INotificationContent.Message
member.summary: Gets the message body text of the notification.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.INotificationContent.Type
member.summary: Gets the type of the notification (e.g., success, warning, error, information).

member.name: P:Notification.Core.INotificationContent.BackgroundColor
member.summary: Gets the custom background color override for the notification, or null to use the default.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.INotificationContent.ForegroundColor
member.summary: Gets the custom foreground color override for the notification, or null to use the default.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.INotificationContent.TrimType
member.summary: Gets the text trimming type applied when content exceeds available space.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.INotificationContent.RowsCount
member.summary: Gets the maximum number of visible text rows in the notification.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.INotificationContent.TitleSettings
member.summary: Gets the text display settings for the notification title.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.INotificationContent.MessageSettings
member.summary: Gets the text display settings for the notification message.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.INotificationContent.Icon
member.summary: Gets the icon displayed in the notification.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.INotificationContent.Image
member.summary: Gets the image data displayed in the notification.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.INotificationContent.LeftButtonAction
member.summary: Gets the action invoked when the left button is clicked.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.INotificationContent.LeftButtonContent
member.summary: Gets the content displayed on the left button.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.INotificationContent.RightButtonAction
member.summary: Gets the action invoked when the right button is clicked.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.INotificationContent.RightButtonContent
member.summary: Gets the content displayed on the right button.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.INotificationContent.CloseOnClick
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the notification is dismissed when clicked.

member.name: T:Notification.Core.INotificationService
member.summary: Provides methods for displaying and managing notifications.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.INotificationService.Show(Notification.Core.NotificationRequest)
member.summary: Displays a notification based on the specified request.
member.param: The notification request containing content and configuration.
member.returns: A unique identifier for the displayed notification.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.INotificationService.Dismiss(System.Guid)
member.summary: Dismisses a specific notification by its identifier.
member.param: The unique identifier of the notification to dismiss.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.INotificationService.DismissAll
member.summary: Dismisses all currently displayed notifications.

member.name: T:Notification.Core.INotifierProgress
member.summary: Represents a progress reporter for notification-based operations with cancellation and timing support.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.INotifierProgress.IsFinished
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the associated operation has finished.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.INotifierProgress.CancellationToken
member.summary: Gets the cancellation token that signals when the operation should be cancelled.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.INotifierProgress.CancelSource
member.summary: Gets the cancellation token source used to trigger cancellation of the operation.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.INotifierProgress.WaitingTimer
member.summary: Gets the timer that tracks the elapsed waiting time of the operation.

member.name: T:Notification.Core.NotificationContentData
member.summary: Represents the content data for a notification, including text, colors, buttons, and media.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationContentData.Title
member.summary: Gets or sets the notification title text.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationContentData.Message
member.summary: Gets or sets the notification message body text.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationContentData.Type
member.summary: Gets or sets the notification type that determines the visual style.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationContentData.BackgroundColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the custom background color. When null, the default color from configuration is used.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationContentData.ForegroundColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the custom foreground (text) color. When null, the default color from configuration is used.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationContentData.TrimType
member.summary: Gets or sets the text trimming type applied to the notification message.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationContentData.RowsCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of visible text rows before trimming is applied.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationContentData.TitleSettings
member.summary: Gets or sets the text rendering settings for the title.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationContentData.MessageSettings
member.summary: Gets or sets the text rendering settings for the message.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationContentData.Icon
member.summary: Gets or sets the icon displayed in the notification. The type is platform-dependent.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationContentData.Image
member.summary: Gets or sets the image data displayed in the notification.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationContentData.LeftButtonAction
member.summary: Gets or sets the action invoked when the left button is clicked.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationContentData.LeftButtonContent
member.summary: Gets or sets the content displayed on the left button.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationContentData.RightButtonAction
member.summary: Gets or sets the action invoked when the right button is clicked.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationContentData.RightButtonContent
member.summary: Gets or sets the content displayed on the right button.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationContentData.CloseOnClick
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the notification is closed when clicked.

member.name: T:Notification.Core.NotificationProgressReport
member.summary: Represents an immutable progress report for a notification progress bar.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationProgressReport.Value
member.summary: Gets the progress value as a percentage (0-100), or null if indeterminate.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationProgressReport.Message
member.summary: Gets the progress status message displayed to the user.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationProgressReport.Title
member.summary: Gets the progress bar title text.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationProgressReport.ShowCancel
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the cancel button should be shown, or null to keep the current state.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationProgressReport.#ctor(System.Nullable{System.Double},System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct.
member.param: The progress value as a percentage (0-100), or null for indeterminate.
Whether to show the cancel button, or null to keep the current state.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationProgressReport.#ctor(System.Double)
member.summary: Initializes a new determinate progress report with only a value.
member.param: The progress value as a percentage (0-100).

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationProgressReport.#ctor(System.Double,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new determinate progress report with a value and a status message.
member.param: The progress value as a percentage (0-100).

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationProgressReport.#ctor(System.Double,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new determinate progress report with a value, a status message and a title.
member.param: The progress value as a percentage (0-100).

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationProgressReport.Indeterminate(System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Creates an indeterminate progress report that carries no numeric value.
member.param: Whether to show the cancel button, or null to keep the current state.
member.returns: An indeterminate .

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationProgressReport.WithValue(System.Nullable{System.Double})
member.summary: Returns a copy of this report with the specified progress value.
member.param: The new progress value, or null for indeterminate.
member.returns: A new with the updated value.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationProgressReport.WithMessage(System.String)
member.summary: Returns a copy of this report with the specified status message.
member.returns: A new with the updated message.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationProgressReport.WithTitle(System.String)
member.summary: Returns a copy of this report with the specified title.
member.returns: A new with the updated title.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationProgressReport.WithShowCancel(System.Nullable{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Returns a copy of this report with the specified cancel button visibility.
member.param: Whether to show the cancel button, or null to keep the current state.
member.returns: A new with the updated cancel button visibility.

member.name: T:Notification.Core.NotificationRequest
member.summary: Represents a complete request to display a notification, including all visual and behavioral options.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationRequest.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique identifier for this notification request.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationRequest.Title
member.summary: Gets or sets the notification title text.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationRequest.Message
member.summary: Gets or sets the notification message body text.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationRequest.Type
member.summary: Gets or sets the notification type that determines the visual style.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationRequest.AreaName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the notification area where this notification should be displayed.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationRequest.ExpirationTime
member.summary: Gets or sets the duration after which the notification automatically closes. When null, the default expiration time from configuration is used.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationRequest.CloseOnClick
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the notification is closed when clicked.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationRequest.ShowCloseButton
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the close button is visible.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationRequest.Priority
member.summary: Gets or sets the display priority of this notification.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationRequest.GroupKey
member.summary: Gets or sets the group key used to deduplicate notifications. Notifications with the same group key replace each other.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationRequest.BackgroundColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the custom background color. When null, the default color from configuration is used.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationRequest.ForegroundColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the custom foreground (text) color. When null, the default color from configuration is used.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationRequest.TitleSettings
member.summary: Gets or sets the text rendering settings for the title.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationRequest.MessageSettings
member.summary: Gets or sets the text rendering settings for the message.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationRequest.TrimType
member.summary: Gets or sets the text trimming type applied to the notification message.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationRequest.RowsCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of visible text rows before trimming is applied.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationRequest.LeftButtonAction
member.summary: Gets or sets the action invoked when the left button is clicked.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationRequest.LeftButtonContent
member.summary: Gets or sets the text content displayed on the left button.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationRequest.RightButtonAction
member.summary: Gets or sets the action invoked when the right button is clicked.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationRequest.RightButtonContent
member.summary: Gets or sets the text content displayed on the right button.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationRequest.OnClick
member.summary: Gets or sets the action invoked when the notification body is clicked.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationRequest.OnClose
member.summary: Gets or sets the action invoked when the notification is closed.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationRequest.OnRightClick
member.summary: Gets or sets the action invoked when the notification body is right-clicked.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationRequest.Icon
member.summary: Gets or sets the icon displayed in the notification. The type is platform-dependent.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationRequest.PlatformImage
member.summary: Gets or sets the platform-specific image object for the notification.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationRequest.Content
member.summary: Gets or sets an arbitrary platform-specific content object displayed instead of the standard title/message layout. The type is platform-dependent (for example, a WPF control). When set, the title, message and related text options are ignored.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationRequest.Extensions
member.summary: Gets or sets a dictionary of custom extension data attached to this notification.

member.name: T:Notification.Core.ProgressBarOptions
member.summary: Represents configuration options for a progress bar notification.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.ProgressBarOptions.Title
member.summary: Gets or sets the progress bar title text.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.ProgressBarOptions.ShowCancelButton
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the cancel button is shown.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.ProgressBarOptions.ShowProgress
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the progress bar is visible.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.ProgressBarOptions.AreaName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the notification area where the progress bar is displayed.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.ProgressBarOptions.TrimText
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether long text should be trimmed.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.ProgressBarOptions.DefaultRowsCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the default number of visible text rows.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.ProgressBarOptions.BaseWaitingMessage
member.summary: Gets or sets the base message displayed while calculating estimated remaining time.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.ProgressBarOptions.IsCollapse
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the progress bar can be collapsed.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.ProgressBarOptions.TitleWhenCollapsed
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the title is shown when the progress bar is collapsed.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.ProgressBarOptions.BackgroundColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the custom background color for the progress bar notification.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.ProgressBarOptions.ForegroundColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the custom foreground (text) color for the progress bar notification.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.ProgressBarOptions.ProgressColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the color of the progress indicator.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.ProgressBarOptions.Icon
member.summary: Gets or sets the icon displayed in the progress bar notification. The type is platform-dependent.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.ProgressBarOptions.TitleSettings
member.summary: Gets or sets the text rendering settings for the title.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.ProgressBarOptions.MessageSettings
member.summary: Gets or sets the text rendering settings for the message.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.ProgressBarOptions.ShowCloseButton
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the close button is visible.

member.name: T:Notification.Core.OperationTimer
member.summary: Estimates the remaining time for a long-running operation based on elapsed time and current progress.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.OperationTimer.BaseWaitingMessage
member.summary: Gets or sets the message displayed while the initial time estimate is being calculated.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.OperationTimer.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a custom waiting message.
member.param: The message displayed while calculating the initial estimate.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.OperationTimer.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the default waiting message.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.OperationTimer.Start
member.summary: Starts or resumes the internal stopwatch.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.OperationTimer.Stop
member.summary: Stops the internal stopwatch.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.OperationTimer.Reset
member.summary: Resets the internal stopwatch and restarts timing from zero.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.OperationTimer.Restart
member.summary: Restarts the internal stopwatch, resetting the elapsed time to zero and starting immediately.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.OperationTimer.CalculateOperationTime(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Calculates the estimated remaining operation time based on integer progress indices.
member.param: The total number of items to process.
member.returns: The estimated remaining time, or null if the estimate cannot be calculated yet.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.OperationTimer.GetStringTime(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns the estimated remaining time as a human-readable string based on integer progress indices.
member.param: The total number of items to process.
member.returns: A formatted time string, or the base waiting message if the estimate is not yet available.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.OperationTimer.CalculateOperationTime(System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Calculates the estimated remaining operation time based on double progress values, using a smoothed average.
member.returns: The estimated remaining time, or null if the estimate cannot be calculated yet.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.OperationTimer.GetStringTime(System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Returns the estimated remaining time as a human-readable string, formatted as days, hours, minutes, or seconds.
member.returns: A formatted time string, or the base waiting message if the estimate is not yet available.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.OperationTimer.Dispose
member.summary: Releases the internal stopwatch resources.

member.name: T:Notification.Core.ProgressSelector`2
member.summary: Adapts an to accept a different source type by applying a selector function.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.ProgressSelector`2.#ctor(System.IProgress{`0},System.Func{`1,`0})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The target progress reporter to delegate to.
A function that transforms the source value to the target type.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.ProgressSelector`2.Report(`1)
member.summary: Reports the source progress value after transforming it using the selector function.

member.name: T:Notification.Core.ProgressExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for to enable type projection.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.ProgressExtensions.Select``2(System.IProgress{``1},System.Func{``0,``1})
member.summary: Projects the source progress type into the target progress type using a selector function.
member.param: The target progress reporter. If null, returns null.
A function that transforms the source value to the target type.
member.returns: An that projects values to the target progress, or null if the input progress is null.

member.name: T:Notification.Core.ProgressReportExtensions
member.summary: Provides convenience extension methods for reporting values without constructing the struct manually.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.ProgressReportExtensions.Report(System.IProgress{Notification.Core.NotificationProgressReport},System.Double)
member.summary: Reports a determinate progress update with only a value.
member.param: The progress reporter. The call is ignored when null.
The progress value as a percentage (0-100).

member.name: M:Notification.Core.ProgressReportExtensions.Report(System.IProgress{Notification.Core.NotificationProgressReport},System.Double,System.String)
member.summary: Reports a determinate progress update with a value and a status message.
member.param: The progress reporter. The call is ignored when null.
The progress value as a percentage (0-100).

member.name: M:Notification.Core.ProgressReportExtensions.Report(System.IProgress{Notification.Core.NotificationProgressReport},System.Double,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Reports a determinate progress update with a value, a status message and a title.
member.param: The progress reporter. The call is ignored when null.
The progress value as a percentage (0-100).

member.name: M:Notification.Core.ProgressReportExtensions.Report(System.IProgress{Notification.Core.NotificationProgressReport},System.Double,System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Reports a determinate progress update with a value, a status message, a title and cancel button visibility.
member.param: The progress reporter. The call is ignored when null.
The progress value as a percentage (0-100).
Whether to show the cancel button, or null to keep the current state.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.ProgressReportExtensions.ReportIndeterminate(System.IProgress{Notification.Core.NotificationProgressReport},System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Reports an indeterminate progress update that carries no numeric value.
member.param: The progress reporter. The call is ignored when null.
Whether to show the cancel button, or null to keep the current state.

member.name: T:Notification.Core.SlowedProgress`1
member.summary: A progress reporter that throttles update notifications to prevent excessive UI refreshes. Reports are suppressed if they occur more frequently than the specified timeout interval.
member.typeparam: The type of the progress value.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.SlowedProgress`1.#ctor(System.Action{`0},System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a handler and throttle interval.
member.param: The action invoked when a progress update is reported (subject to throttling).
The minimum interval in milliseconds between progress reports.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.SlowedProgress`1.OnReport(`0)
member.summary: Reports a progress update, suppressing it if the throttle interval has not elapsed since the last report.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.SlowedProgress`1.Dispose
member.summary: Releases the internal stopwatch resources.

member.name: T:Notification.Core.INotificationQueue
member.summary: Provides a queue for scheduling notifications when the maximum display count is reached.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.INotificationQueue.Enqueue(Notification.Core.NotificationRequest)
member.summary: Adds a notification request to the pending queue.
member.returns: The unique identifier assigned to the queued notification.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.INotificationQueue.PendingCount
member.summary: Gets the number of notifications currently waiting in the queue.

member.name: T:Notification.Core.NotificationQueue
member.summary: Manages a queue of notification requests with support for group-based deduplication.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationQueue.#ctor(Notification.Core.INotificationService)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The notification service used to display notifications.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationQueue.Enqueue(Notification.Core.NotificationRequest)
member.summary: Enqueues a notification request for display. If a notification with the same group key is already active, returns the existing notification identifier.
member.returns: The unique identifier of the displayed or existing notification.

member.name: P:Notification.Core.NotificationQueue.PendingCount
member.summary: Gets the number of pending notifications in the queue.

member.name: M:Notification.Core.NotificationQueue.RemoveGroup(System.String)
member.summary: Removes a notification group by its key, allowing new notifications with the same key to be displayed.
member.param: The group key to remove. If null, no action is taken.
